examples: Hopefuls had until April 7 to apply for the "horrendous assignment" — as the company teasingly calls it — which starts mid-May.
Hopefuls have until April 7 to apply for the "horrendous assignment" -- as the company teasingly calls it -- which starts mid-May.
He called her Artemis, Demeter, and other fanciful names half teasingly, which she did not like because she did not understand them.
She said it teasingly, with a little laugh, but in her look was an anxious question.
Isaiah Berlin, an Oxford political thinker, referred to him teasingly as Christ.
